design_philosophy: Apple-level Minimalism + Notion-like Cleanliness + Zoho-scale Robustness. High density, structural grid, touch-optimized (min 44x44px targets).

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, Data Correlation). Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all interactive elements (buttons, checkboxes, table rows) to accommodate tablet mechanics.
spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.

components.cards: Subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius) or cardless sharp edges. 1px solid borders, no soft shadows. Flat solid surfaces.
components.tables: Dense. Sortable columns. High contrast row borders. Row status text. Touch-friendly row height (min 44px).
components.buttons: High contrast. Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g. hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white).
components.navigation: Sticky nav with Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) and 1px bottom border.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard inputs heavily customized to remove generic look. Sharp borders, clear focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp transitions. -translate-y-[1px] on cards, subtle shadow.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Minimalist. Meaningful micro-interactions for feedback. Tab transitions, modal entrances.

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight. Dense dashboard suitability.

media_urls.description: Warehouse shelves background for login/landing page
Auto parts imagery for blank states or context

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons.
Use Shadcn components for all interactive logic (tables, inputs, dialogs, etc.).
Implement pure HTML+Tailwind for complex grid layouts (Control Room grid style).
Ensure dual-mode (light/dark) is flawless, using Tailwind dark: variants.
Implement Cmd+K search using Shadcn Command menu.
Charts must use Recharts or Shadcn Chart components (Stacked bar for aging matrix).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Ensure Outfit (or similar geometric/grotesque sans) is applied via Tailwind.
DO NOT use teal or purple as primary colors. Stick to the high-contrast monochromatic base with blue/red operational accents.
Ensure touch targets (min 44x44px) are enforced across the app, especially in tables and menus.
